AI DevTools Download Hub

One page for all modern AI coding agents. Pick your tool, copy the command, start building.

🦞 5 Agents ⚡ Cross-platform 🔗 Official Links
🦞 OpenClaw
↗
macOS Windows Linux Universal
macOS 
brew install openclaw
Windows (PowerShell) 
iwr -useb https://openclaw.ai/install.ps1 | iex
Linux 
curl -fsSL https://openclaw.ai/install.sh | bash
Universal (npm) 
npm install -g openclaw@latest
GitHub Releases
🧠 Hermes Agent
↗
macOS Windows (Beta) Linux / WSL2 Docker
macOS / Linux / WSL2 
curl -fsSL https://raw.githubusercontent.com/NousResearch/hermes-agent/main/scripts/install.sh | bash
Windows (Beta, PowerShell) 
iex (irm https://raw.githubusercontent.com/NousResearch/hermes-agent/main/scripts/install.ps1)
Docker 
docker pull nousresearch/hermes-agent
GitHub Repo
⚡ Kilo Code
↗
macOS Windows Linux CLI
VS Code / Cursor 
Marketplace → Search "Kilo Code"
JetBrains 
Plugin Marketplace → Kilo Code
CLI (npm) 
npm install -g @kilocode/cli
GitHub Releases
🤖 Claude Code
↗
macOS Windows Linux / WSL2 Homebrew
macOS / Linux / WSL2 
curl -fsSL https://claude.ai/install.sh | bash
Windows (PowerShell) 
irm https://claude.ai/install.ps1 | iex
Homebrew (macOS) 
brew install --cask claude-code
WinGet (Windows) 
winget install Anthropic.ClaudeCode
GitHub Releases
🖥️ OpenAI Codex CLI
↗
macOS Windows (WSL2) Linux npm / Brew
Universal (npm) 
npm install -g @openai/codex
Homebrew (macOS) 
brew install --cask codex
Windows 
⚠️ Recommended: use with WSL2
GitHub Releases

Data sourced from official GitHub repositories. Updated regularly.
